purpose: Schema for the separate AI workload / GPU optimization screen response.

response_fields.name: scenario_id
response_fields.description: Scenario identifier used to build the GPU screen response.

response_fields.name: rack_count
response_fields.description: Number of racks represented in the response.

response_fields.name: summary
response_fields.description: GPU screen aggregate summary for the selected scenario.

summary_fields.name: avg_gpu_util_pct
summary_fields.description: Average GPU utilization across all racks.

summary_fields.name: max_gpu_util_pct
summary_fields.description: Maximum GPU utilization across all racks.

summary_fields.name: min_gpu_util_pct
summary_fields.description: Minimum GPU utilization across all racks.

summary_fields.name: high_gpu_rack_count
summary_fields.description: Number of racks with GPU pressure label high.

summary_fields.name: critical_rack_count
summary_fields.description: Number of racks with evaluated_status critical.

summary_fields.name: warning_rack_count
summary_fields.description: Number of racks with evaluated_status warning.

summary_fields.name: total_power_kw
summary_fields.description: Total rack power draw across the represented hall.

summary_fields.name: hottest_rack_id
summary_fields.description: Rack with the highest inlet temperature.

summary_fields.name: highest_gpu_rack_id
summary_fields.description: Rack with the highest GPU utilization.

summary_fields.name: optimization_message
summary_fields.description: Deterministic Phase 1 demo recommendation for the selected scenario.

rack_gpu_record_fields.name: inlet_temp_c
rack_gpu_record_fields.description: Rack inlet temperature in degrees Celsius.

rack_gpu_record_fields.name: gpu_pressure_label
rack_gpu_record_fields.description: Derived GPU pressure label: normal, elevated, or high.

planned_endpoint.description: Returns file-backed GPU screen response for the requested scenario.
